Definition.student_text:
Introduction:-
- Open-Source, cross platform, JS runtime environment
- Built on Google chrome's V8 Engine
- Allows JS to run outside the browser
- Used to server-side programming
- Event driven, non blocking I/O model -> highly scalable
- single threaded
Definition.model_text: Artificial Intelligence is a branch of computer science that focuses on building systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence.

Body.student_text:
Features:-
- Fast execution
- Asynchronous (no waiting)
- Cross platform
- Large package ecosystem -> NPM
- Best for real time apps
Architecture:-
> Node.js uses Single-Threaded Event Loop Architecture.
> It can handle many client requests at the same time.
> Node.js uses asynchronous I/O and callbacks.
Key components ->
1) V8 Engine
   - Google's JS engine
   - Converts JS -> Machine code
   - Provides high speed execution
2) libuv
   - Library for handling async operations
   - Provides event loop + thread pool
   - Handles I/O tasks like file system, DNS, network
Body.model_text: Artificial Intelligence enables machines to learn from data and improve performance using techniques such as machine learning and deep learning. AI systems can be categorized into narrow AI, which performs specific tasks, and general AI, which aims to perform intellectual tasks similar to humans.

Conclusion.model_text: Artificial Intelligence is widely used in fields such as healthcare, education, transportation, business, and entertainment.

model_answer.Definition: Artificial Intelligence is a branch of computer science that focuses on building systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence.
model_answer.Body: Artificial Intelligence enables machines to learn from data and improve performance using techniques such as machine learning and deep learning. AI systems can be categorized into narrow AI, which performs specific tasks, and general AI, which aims to perform intellectual tasks similar to humans.
model_answer.Conclusion: Artificial Intelligence is widely used in fields such as healthcare, education, transportation, business, and entertainment.
